summary: Frontend-only verification of latest changes to 'Asisten Petugas SE2026' vanilla PWA: (1) Pemilik Usaha checkbox removal from Pendapatan tab, (2) 3 reset buttons removed from Belanja RT (Makanan/Non-Makanan/Tahunan), (3) new 'Salin Catatan (Tenaga Kerja & 26.b-e)' button added in all 5 Usaha tabs via salinBiayaUsaha(idx), (4) green->blue/neutral color redesign. Rebuilt webapp-src via build.sh to ensure served build matched source before testing. All 4 requested changes verified working correctly in live browser test (mobile 375x812 + desktop 1920x800). Regression checks (rugi negative laba, +Responden Baru reset, Simpan Semua validation) also passed. One notable code-review finding: the color redesign left many `var(--green-bg)` (light green #eaf7ef) backgrounds still in use across result boxes (Hasil Kalkulasi Harian/Bulanan boxes, Tenaga Kerja summary, R26 total row, selected Jenis Usaha card, Pendapatan surplus box) and the Jenis Usaha dropdown arrow icon SVG is still hardcoded dark green (#1d6b2e) - this contradicts the stated goal of a fully neutral gray/white + blue theme with no leftover green. IMPORTANT TESTING NOTE: the localStorage bypass (se2026_kode_aktif_v1) alone is NOT fully reliable if the browser is online - lock.js runs a background verification against the real Google Apps Script and will re-lock with 'Sesi aktivasi berakhir' if the code isn't actually registered for that device fingerprint. Blocking `**/script.google.com/**` via page.route in addition to the localStorage seed is required for a stable bypass.

ui_bugs.issue: When laba (profit) is negative (rugi), the numeric value text itself is NOT colored red - it stays the default blue (var(--bps-blue)) because .hasil-box.tahunan .hasil-nilai forces color:var(--bps-blue) regardless of sign. Only the separate #rugiWarning_N banner below shows in red. The number does correctly show the minus sign (e.g. 'Rp -23.760.000') and rugi is not counted as positive, so the underlying calculation is correct - this is purely a color/visual gap versus the stated regression requirement 'laba shown in red/negative'.

design_issues.screen: Usaha tab (Hasil Kalkulasi boxes, Tenaga Kerja summary, Rincian 26 total row), Pendapatan tab (surplus box), Jenis Usaha select dropdown
issues: Color redesign is incomplete: several elements still use the old `var(--green-bg)` (#eaf7ef, a light green tint) as background - .hasil-box.harian, .hasil-box.bulanan (and inline-styled 'Omzet/Bulan' box across all 5 Usaha tabs), .tk-summary (Tenaga Kerja yearly summary), .r26-row.total (26.f TOTAL row in Rincian Pengeluaran), .jenis-card.selected, #pend-surplus-box, .add-btn:hover, .export-btn:hover.
The .jenis-select dropdown arrow icon is an inline SVG with a hardcoded dark-green fill color (%231d6b2e) - visually shows a green chevron on an otherwise blue/neutral themed select box.

These leftover green tints are visible in core, frequently-used screens (right after calculating income/expense), so the app still visually reads as partially green rather than fully migrated to the neutral gray/white + soft blue theme described in the task.

action_items: Consider renaming/replacing remaining var(--green-bg) usages (.hasil-box.harian/.bulanan, .tk-summary, .r26-row.total, .jenis-card.selected, #pend-surplus-box, .add-btn:hover, .export-btn:hover) with a neutral or soft-blue-tinted background to complete the color redesign, OR confirm this is intentional (keeping green only as a 'positive/success' indicator color, distinct from the primary blue theme) - if intentional, no change needed, but worth confirming with product intent.
Update the hardcoded dark-green SVG fill (#1d6b2e) in .jenis-select background-image to match the blue theme (e.g. var(--bps-blue) hex).

Optional: color-code res-laba-hari/bulan/tahun value text red when rugi is true (labaTahun < 0) to match the regression requirement description exactly, in addition to the existing rugi warning banner.
critical_code_review_comments: app.js: tambahAnggotaPendapatan() (line ~3497) confirmed no checkbox/Pemilik Usaha logic remains in the Pendapatan household-member row markup - clean removal.

index.html: Reset Makanan/Reset Non-Makanan/Reset Tahunan buttons (onclick=resetMakanan()/resetNonMakanan()/resetTahunan()) are fully removed from the DOM in all 3 Belanja RT sections, while Salin Catatan buttons (salinMakanan/salinNonMakanan/salinTahunan) remain intact and functional. Note: the JS functions resetMakanan()/resetNonMakanan()/resetTahunan() themselves are still defined and still called internally by mulaiRespondenBaru() and editResponden() for state-reset purposes - this is correct/expected since only the user-facing buttons needed removal, not the underlying reset logic.

salinBiayaUsaha(idx) (app.js line 3209) correctly builds a text summary with Tenaga Kerja fields + itemized 26.a-26.e breakdown (via itemsA-E) + 26.f TOTAL line, and is correctly wired via onclick in each of the 5 'Usaha N' tabs, positioned right after the Rincian Pengeluaran card and before the '🧮 HITUNG PENGHASILAN' button - matches spec exactly.

styles.css :root correctly defines --bps-blue: #2b5fa8 as primary; header, tab-nav, tab-btn.active, hitung-btn, copy-btn.blue, badges, r26-val, inner-tab-btn.active, resp-aktif-bar all correctly reference --bps-blue/--bps-light. However --green-bg/--green variables were kept (not removed) and are still referenced in ~9 places across result-display components (see design_issues) - partial migration.
updated_files: /app/frontend/public/webapp/* (rebuilt from /app/webapp-src via build.sh to sync served build with source before testing - no source code was modified by this testing pass)

success_rate.frontend: ~92% (all 4 primary requested changes + all regressions passed; only a minor color-consistency gap found, no blocking bugs)

seed_data_creation: None persisted - localStorage-based state is per-browser-context and was not required to persist across test runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reliable lock bypass recipe: `await page.route('**/script.google.com/**', lambda route: route.abort())` BEFORE navigation, THEN `localStorage.setItem('se2026_kode_aktif_v1','AGEN2026')` + reload. Without the route block, lock.js's background verifikasiKodeBackground() will contact the real Apps Script, get a non-'aktif' response for this test device/code, and re-lock the app mid-session with 'Sesi aktivasi berakhir' - this happened in an initial test attempt and is NOT a bug, just an artifact of the bypass technique needing the network block too. Also remember to set #jumlahUsaha to >=1 on the Responden tab BEFORE navigating to the Usaha tab, otherwise tab-usaha renders empty (jumlah=0 hides all inner-usaha-content by design).
rca_of_issue: N/A - no blocking bugs found. The only design gap (leftover green-bg CSS variable usage) is a straightforward CSS cleanup: search styles.css/index.html for `var(--green-bg)`, `var(--green)`, and the hardcoded `%231d6b2e` SVG fill, and replace with blue/neutral equivalents if a fully green-free theme is desired.
